## fiz

Run the fiz CLI

```
fiz [flags]
```

### Options

```
      --allow-deprecated-model   Allow deprecated model catalog references
      --harness string           Harness hard pin (selects a specific harness)
  -h, --help                     help for fiz
      --json                     Output result as JSON
      --list-models              List available models with routing metadata
      --max-iter int             Max iterations
      --max-power int            Maximum catalog model power for automatic routing
      --min-power int            Minimum catalog model power for automatic routing
      --model string             Model route key or explicit concrete model override
  -p, --p string                 Prompt (use @file to read from file)
      --policy string            Routing policy (cheap, default, smart, or air-gapped)
      --preset string            System prompt preset
      --provider string          Named provider from config
      --reasoning string         Reasoning control
      --system string            System prompt
      --version                  Print version
      --work-dir string          Working directory
```
